query: SELECT DATE(exitDate) as trade_date, DAYNAME(DATE(exitDate)) as day_name, COUNT(*) as trade_count, SUM(pnl)/100 as total_pnl FROM trades WHERE DAYOFWEEK(exitDate) = 7 GROUP BY DATE(exitDate) ORDER BY DATE(exitDate) DESC LIMIT 10;
